title: Receive Counsel on the Mountains
description: Let the Shepherds restore perspective: warnings are mercy, and the City is real.
description_zh: 让牧人恢复你的眼光：警戒也是怜悯，而那城是真实的。

steps.description: Look through the glass toward the Celestial City.
Carry the Shepherds' warnings into the next ground.
steps.description_zh: 带着牧人的警戒走向下一片地。
